selection.caveat: window boundaries derive from LLM-generated timestamps; frames are canonical
transcript_excerpt: [818s-849s] They walk around the factory, checking on different areas, equipment, and coworkers.
[849s-859s] Back at the hydraulic press, they remove a mold, extract a block, clean the mold, replace it, and operate the press.
[859s-868s] They interact with the control panel.
window_activities: strike inverted mold to eject compressed block
blow debris from mold cavities with air gun
load assembled mold into hydraulic press
activate hydraulic press via control panel
